findings:
Ang report ngayong araw (4/27) nag-e-extend at structurally nag-co-codify sa prediction surface mula nakalipas na linggo, na may **walong predictions na umabot sa Relevance 5**: secret-leakage-through-CI-and-agents (4/20) nag-land ng foundational simple-git RCE + Future #2's CISA/NIST sub-catalog framing; GGUF supply chains (4/21) hawak with SGLang unpatched pa rin at ang CSO Online cross-vendor "copy-paste vulnerability" framing; OAuth-trust + SSO-AI-extension (4/22) ay nasa T-3 days hanggang GA na may Okta + Operant + Salt Security's 48.9%-cannot-monitor data — at Future #3 direct na nag-e-extend nito sa state-level statutory layer; ang Agent Control Plane hyperscaler battleground (4/23) ay Big-3-confirmed na may Okta + Google Cloud + AWS Bedrock visible sa parehong araw; ang three-cloud-oligopoly capacity-capture (4/25) ay anchored ng ~$650B-$700B Mag 7 capex framing + ang explicit anchor-deal naming sa Future #1; ang MCP-protocol attack surface (4/25) nakikita ang both threat (SGLang/simple-git/Antigravity/Google IPI 32%) at defense (Okta Agent Gateway/Operant/Google remote-MCP) na sumusulpot sa parehong news cycle at na-restate ng Future #2; ang hyperscaler-AI-lab capital-coupling stack-lock-in (4/26) carry-forward via Project Glasswing + Mag 7 capex + Hermes-on-Bedrock; at ang inference-server primitive-supply-chain LLM-INFRA-CWE class (4/26) ay direct na na-restate na may sharper specificity ng Future #2 ngayong araw laban sa 5-CVE backdrop.

**Limang predictions umabot sa Relevance 3-4**: ang 5-pole hyperscaler-frontier-lab regime (4/21) sa 4 via Project Glasswing + Mag 7 framing; ang 27B-Dense + 1M-context standard (4/23) sa 4 via Qwen3.6 official page + Apidog roundup pero walang second-vendor entrant; ang 1M-context-default-open-weight era (4/24) sa 4 via DeepSeek V4 + Qwen3.6 dual-track; local-first cloud-overflow inversion (4/20) sa 3 via DeepSeek V4 + Qwen3.6 + Bonsai cumulative na walang bagong structural step; proprietary vs open-weight split (4/21) sa 3 via DeepSeek V4 + Simon Willison + MIT Tech Review carry-forward na walang bagong pricing move; Physical-AI-as-RaaS (4/22) sa 3 via Boston Dynamics 30k/year + Tesla Optimus V3; Physical-AI-8h production runs (4/24) sa 3 via Boston Dynamics staged plan + Tesla V3 timeline; Physical-AI league tables sa IROS / GTC (4/25) sa 3 via the same; third-party-vendor-boundary + URL-naming-entropy (4/23) sa 3 via the Mythos contractor-URL-guessing saga revival + Altman-vs-Anthropic + CNBC public opinion + Future #3's state-statute extension; consumer-GPU coding agent ≥30% by Q3 2026 (4/26) sa 3 via Qwen3.6 + DeepSeek V4 + Bonsai + Foundry Local GA na walang Big-3 IDE local-first-toggle commit.

**Tatlong predictions ay nasa Relevance 1-2**: Headless Everything (4/20) sa 1 dahil ang Hermes Agent v0.11.0's headline Ink TUI rewrite nire-reinforce ang OS-level vector laban sa headless-metadata thesis; Training-vs-inference SKU split (4/22) sa 1 dahil walang MAIA / MTIA dual-track announcements (Cerebras IPO ay adjacent, hindi on-thesis); at Capital-markets-reset for AI-agent-displaced SaaS (4/24) sa 2 dahil ang Mag 7 framing ngayong araw ay "AI ROI reckoning" / "rewarding spending on faith → demanding tangible profit" sa halip ng predicted Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet 15%+ chained falls — at Motley Fool's "Great Rotation Is Reversing" actually nag-a-argue sa opposite vector.

Ang dominant structural picture ngayong araw: ang tatlong predictions ngayong araw (Mag 7 AI-ROI reckoning + AI-Infra CVE class graduating sa regulatory primitive + public-opinion-blowback → state statutory identity para autonomous agents) ay essentially next-step extensions ng predictions noong nakalipas na linggo. Ang capital-coupling thesis (4/21, 4/25, 4/26), ang inference-server-CVE-class thesis (4/19, 4/21, 4/26), at ang OAuth/Agent-Control-Plane/Okta cluster (4/22, 4/23) — lahat nag-snap into the Apr 28-30 window: AI Dev 26 SF nag-open Apr 28-29 sa Pier 48 na may 3,000+ devs; Mag 7 nag-print Apr 29-30; Okta for AI Agents pumupunta sa GA Apr 30. Tatlong threads na predicted across 4/20-4/26 nag-co-converge sa parehong 72-hour window.
relation_to_my_preds:
Dalawa sa tatlong personal predictions makakakuha ng continued strong corroboration ngayong araw; ang pangatlo ay walang direct hit.

**Malicious local LLMs functioning like malware → strong continuing corroboration.** Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 case ay nananatiling canonical example: ang model file (GGUF) ay nagdadala ng executable code (Jinja2 SSTI sa `tokenizer.chat_template`) na nag-fa-fire sa loob ng inference server, at ang v0.5.10 nag-ship nang walang recommended `ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` mitigation — ibig sabihin ang GGUF-as-malware vector ay nananatiling live sa production at ang upstream ay hindi ito ina-address. Ang CSO Online's "copy-paste vulnerability hits AI inference frameworks at Meta, Nvidia, and Microsoft" nag-ge-generalize sa eksaktong failure mode na pinredict mo across vendors. Ang zero-trust direction na pinredict mo bilang stable response ay visibly nag-co-converge: Okta for AI Agents GA in 3 days (Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway + credential vaulting + universal logout), Operant AI's Zero-Trust MCP Gateway sumali sa Okta Integration Network, Google Cloud's remote-MCP-server-support GA + Wiz integration, Salt Security framing "you cannot secure AI without securing the APIs that power it" laban sa 48.9% ng orgs hindi makaka-monitor ng AI-agent traffic. Ang Future #3 ngayong araw nag-e-extend nito sa regulatory layer: isang US-state Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents Act na nire-reflect ang Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern by Q3 2026 — ang "intentionally design system paths AI alone cannot access" architecture nag-mo-move mula product papuntang law. Sa harness-engineering / behavior-monitoring side, ang iyong "monitor and manage will attract only short-term attention" framing nananatiling consistent sa Pillar Antigravity case (Secure Mode bypass) at SGLang non-patch — ang defensive harnesses patuloy na nababapas sa primitive level.

**Cloud-API-for-advanced + local-LLM-for-routine division → continued direct corroboration.** Ngayong araw nire-reinforce ang cost-pressure half ng iyong prediction nang walang bagong pricing move: ang **Mag 7 capex framing as "AI ROI reckoning"** — combined 2026 capex mula Alphabet $175B-$185B + Amazon ~$200B + Meta $115B-$135B = ~$650B-$700B laban sa Wall Street demanding tangible profit, with goMarkets framing it as "rewarding spending on faith → demanding tangible profit" — ay eksaktong energy + compute cost-pressure dynamic na pinforecast mo bilang trigger para sa SaaS pricing changes. Ang local-side substitutes patuloy na lumalalim: DeepSeek V4-Pro sa $1.74 / $3.48 per M tokens with V4-Pro Hugging Face page live at Simon Willison nag-a-anchor ng practitioner read, Qwen3.6-27B na tumatakbo sa single RTX 3090 sa 40 tok/s, PrismML Bonsai-8B 1-bit na tumatakbo natively sa iPhone 17 Pro Max sa 44 tok/s. Ang **Hermes Agent v0.11.0** ay ang practitioner-facing crystallization ng hybrid pattern na inilarawan ng iyong prediction: pluggable transport architecture under every provider, 5 new inference paths, native AWS Bedrock + GPT-5.5 via Codex OAuth (cloud routes para sa advanced tasks) na tumatakbo kasabay ng local-runtime self-host options (routine tasks) — ang division-of-labor harness, hindi binary choice. Ang Mag 7 print window ngayong araw (Apr 29-30) ay ang next observation point kung ang SaaS-pricing-structure shift na inanticipate mo ay lalabas sa capex commentary.

**RL/LLM-based forecasting performance for real-world phenomena → walang direct hit ngayong araw.** Ang news ngayong araw ay walang items sa RL-for-forecasting research, finance/weather/policy LLM forecasters, o methodology benchmarks para sa LLM-driven prediction systems. Ang pinaka-malapit na adjacent — Simon Willison's Apr 27 "Vibe coding SwiftUI apps" piece + Apr 24 DeepSeek V4 review — ay practitioner-quality reads, hindi forecasting-methodology pieces. Ang AI Dev 26 SF Apr 28-29 (Andrew Ng-hosted sa Pier 48) nag-li-list ng "AI Governance" at "Coding-with-AI" tracks pero walang forecasting/evals track mula sa public agenda. Ang Stanford's **Causal Science Conference: Frontiers in AI Evaluation (Apr 29, 12-6 PM PT, Simonyi Conference Center)** ay ang pinaka-malapit na near-term event na maaaring mag-surface ng signals sa RL-forecasting axis, pero walang preview content ngayong araw. Carry-only.
